headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Friday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Expand Energy, Lowers Price Target to $127
summary: UBS  analyst Josh Silverstein   maintains Expand Energy (NASDAQ:EXE) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $135 to $127.
